name: dvwa-windows-security-tooling
description: Tool manifest for recreating the optional DVWA security testing environment on Windows.

minimum_brute_force_tools.name: Python requests, BeautifulSoup, and Playwright
minimum_brute_force_tools.purpose: Run generated harnesses, parse pages, generate reports, and capture automatic screenshots.
minimum_brute_force_tools.uninstall: py -m pip uninstall requests beautifulsoup4 playwright

minimum_brute_force_tools.name: Playwright Chromium
minimum_brute_force_tools.uninstall: remove the Playwright browser cache under %LOCALAPPDATA%\ms-playwright if needed

winget_packages.name: Python
winget_packages.required_for: Python runner when Python is absent

winget_packages.name: Git
winget_packages.required_for: Clone sqlmap and Burp MCP server

winget_packages.name: OWASP ZAP
winget_packages.required_for: Proxy, passive scan, replay, optional API

winget_packages.name: IDA Free
winget_packages.required_for: Future binary reversing only; not needed for DVWA Brute Force

source_tools.name: ffuf
source_tools.purpose: Fuzzing and low/medium Brute Force demonstrations

source_tools.name: sqlmap
source_tools.purpose: SQL Injection modules only; not Brute Force
